scripts.test:web:parity: uv run python scripts/generate_web_fixtures.py .tmp/web-fixtures && pnpm --filter @arti-fit/web run test
scripts.gate:web: uv run python scripts/generate_web_contract.py packages/web/src/generated/contract.ts && uv run python scripts/generate_web_fixtures.py .tmp/web-fixtures && pnpm build:web && pnpm test:web && pnpm --filter @arti-fit/web run test:browser && pnpm docs:web
